requirement_topic.en: SIT Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (Ley General de Telecomunicaciones, Decreto 94-96)
requirement_topic.zh: SIT强制型式认可——无线电及电信终端设备型号认证（《电信总法》Decreto 94-96）
requirement_topic.zht: SIT強制型式認可——無線電及電信終端裝置型號認證（《電信總法》Decreto 94-96）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi routers, Bluetooth devices, IoT hubs, smart speakers, and any device incorporating wireless radio technology — must obtain a mandatory SIT homologación (type approval) certificate issued by the Superintendencia de Telecomunicaciones (SIT) before import or sale in Guatemala. The legal basis is the Ley General de Telecomunicaciones (Decreto 94-96) and applicable SIT resolutions. The homologación process requires submission of a technical dossier including radio frequency (RF), EMC, and electrical safety test reports from accredited laboratories; a product description and technical specifications; and documentation from an authorized Guatemalan importer or representative. SIT may accept FCC and CE test reports as a basis for certain technical parameters, but CCC (China Compulsory Certification) and SRRC approvals are not recognised. The SIT homologación certificate is a separate Guatemalan administrative act and must be obtained before marketing, import, or commercial distribution. The homologación certificate number must appear on the Spanish-language product label.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi路由器、蓝牙设备、物联网集线器、智能音箱及任何内置无线技术的设备——在危地马拉进口或销售前，须取得由电信监管局（SIT）颁发的强制型式认可（homologación）证书。法律依据为《电信总法》（Decreto 94-96）及SIT相关决议。型式认可申请须提交技术文件，包括经认可实验室出具的射频（RF）、EMC和电气安全检测报告、产品描述及技术规格，以及授权危地马拉进口商或代表的相关文件。SIT可接受FCC和CE检测报告作为部分技术参数的基础，但不承认CCC（中国强制认证）和SRRC核准。SIT型式认可证书属独立的危地马拉行政行为，须在销售、进口或商业分销前取得。认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi路由器、藍牙裝置、物聯網集線器、智慧音箱及任何內置無線技術的裝置——在瓜地馬拉進口或銷售前，須取得由電信監理局（SIT）頒發的強制型式認可（homologación）證書。法律依據為《電信總法》（Decreto 94-96）及SIT相關決議。型式認可申請須提交技術文件，包括經認可實驗室出具的射頻（RF）、EMC和電氣安全檢測報告、產品描述及技術規格，以及授權瓜地馬拉進口商或代表的相關文件。SIT可接受FCC和CE檢測報告作為部分技術參數的基礎，但不承認CCC（中國強制認證）和SRRC核准。SIT型式認可證書屬獨立的瓜地馬拉行政行為，須在銷售、進口或商業分銷前取得。認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。

standards_or_laws: Ley General de Telecomunicaciones (Decreto 94-96) — Guatemalan general telecommunications law; establishes mandatory homologación (type approval) for radio and telecom terminal equipment
SIT (Superintendencia de Telecomunicaciones) — Guatemalan telecom regulatory authority; issues homologación certificates and oversees radio spectrum management
SIT resolutions — applicable SIT administrative resolutions specifying homologación procedures, technical requirements, and accepted test documentation

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must comply with MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) type-approval requirements and SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices additionally require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the CNCA system for consumer electronics. MIIT SRRC approval covers radio frequency parameters; CCC covers safety and EMC. China also requires a MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for certain telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (GB 15629, GB/T 29242, and related Wi-Fi/Bluetooth standards) form the technical basis. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by SIT and do not substitute for Guatemalan homologación.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须符合工业和信息化部（MIIT）依据无线电管理条例的型号核准要求，以及国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）无线电型号核准。Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备还须依据CNCA体系取得消费电子产品CCC（中国强制认证）。MIIT SRRC核准涵盖无线电频率参数；CCC涵盖安全和EMC。中国还要求特定电信终端设备取得MIIT进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相关Wi-Fi/蓝牙标准）构成技术基础。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被SIT承认，不能替代危地马拉型式认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須符合工業和資訊化部（MIIT）依據無線電管理條例的型號核准要求，以及國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）無線電型號核准。Wi-Fi和藍牙裝置還須依據CNCA體系取得消費電子產品CCC（中國強制認證）。MIIT SRRC核准涵蓋無線電頻率參數；CCC涵蓋安全和EMC。中國還要求特定電信終端設備取得MIIT進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相關Wi-Fi/藍牙標準）構成技術基礎。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被SIT承認，不能替代瓜地馬拉型式認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval — mandatory radio frequency parameter certification for wireless devices in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory safety and EMC certification for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — required for certain telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629 series — Chinese radio (Wi-Fi/802.11) technical standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by SIT and do not substitute for Guatemalan homologación. A separate SIT homologación application must be filed with a complete technical dossier. FCC and CE test reports may be accepted as supporting data within the SIT dossier for certain RF and EMC parameters, potentially reducing retesting cost — but the SIT homologación certificate is a separate administrative act that is always required before import or sale. The homologación certificate number must appear on the Spanish-language product label. Failure to obtain homologación before import or commercial distribution is a regulatory violation subject to penalties and product withdrawal under Guatemalan law.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型号核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被SIT承认，不能替代危地马拉型式认可。须单独向SIT提交含完整技术文件的型式认可申请。FCC和CE检测报告对部分射频和EMC参数可作为SIT文件内的支持数据被接受，有助于降低重测成本——但SIT型式认可证书属独立行政行为，进口或销售前须单独申请取得。认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。进口或商业分销前未取得型式认可属违规行为，依危地马拉法律面临处罚和产品下架风险。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型號核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被SIT承認，不能替代瓜地馬拉型式認可。須單獨向SIT提交含完整技術文件的型式認可申請。FCC和CE檢測報告對部分射頻和EMC參數可作為SIT文件內的支持數據被接受，有助於降低重測成本——但SIT型式認可證書屬獨立行政行為，進口或銷售前須單獨申請取得。認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。進口或商業分銷前未取得型式認可屬違規行為，依瓜地馬拉法律面臨處罰和產品下架風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SIT homologación certificate required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Guatemala under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones (Decreto 94-96); CCC and SRRC not recognised; FCC/CE test reports may be accepted as supporting basis
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval + CCC required for wireless consumer devices in China; MIIT NAL required for certain telecom terminal equipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SIT homologación under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones (Decreto 94-96) is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold in Guatemala. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised. FCC and CE test reports may assist as supporting data within the SIT dossier but do not replace the Guatemalan certificate. The homologación number must appear on the Spanish-language label. Verify current SIT application procedures, accepted laboratory accreditations, and dossier requirements with a qualified Guatemalan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电信总法》（Decreto 94-96），SIT型式认可对所有在危地马拉销售的无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承认。FCC和CE检测报告可作为SIT文件内的支持数据，但不能替代危地马拉证书。认可证书编号须标注于西班牙语标签上。进入市场前请向合格的危地马拉监管专业人士核验现行SIT申请程序、认可的实验室资质和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電信總法》（Decreto 94-96），SIT型式認可對所有在瓜地馬拉銷售的無線電及電信終端裝置為強制性要求。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承認。FCC和CE檢測報告可作為SIT文件內的支持數據，但不能替代瓜地馬拉證書。認可證書編號須標注於西班牙語標籤上。進入市場前請向合格的瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗現行SIT申請程序、認可的實驗室資質和文件要求。
